vision_profile.current_state: Rohan is a Cloud Support Engineer with 4 years of experience, proficient in AWS basics, Linux, and incident management.
vision_profile.main_blocker: He fears being stuck in reactive support roles while lacking expertise in Kubernetes architecture, Terraform, cloud cost optimization, and enterprise solution design.
vision_profile.top_motivation: He is highly motivated to transition into higher-impact architecture and implementation roles, escape night shifts, and leverage his cloud exposure effectively.

milestones.label: M01
milestones.o: You can articulate core cloud concepts, understand basic system design principles, and manage foundational AWS services.
milestones.identity_statement: You are building a robust foundation, transforming your support experience into architectural insight.

modules.title: Cloud & Deployment Fundamentals
lessons: AWS Core Services Overview (EC2, S3, VPC)

video.title: AWS Foundational Services Overview

scenario.title: Troubleshooting EC2 Connectivity

video.title: Advanced Bash for Cloud Operations

scenario.title: Automating Log Analysis with Bash

scenario.title: Designing a Secure Network Topology

science.desc: A critical application is experiencing intermittent connectivity issues. Analyze VPC flow logs and security group configurations to identify the root cause.

modules.title: Foundations of System Design
lessons: Key Principles of Scalability and Reliability
Understanding System Components (Servers, Databases, Load Balancers)

scenario.title: Designing a Simple Web Service

video.title: Achieving High Availability and Fault Tolerance

scenario.title: Scaling a Stateless Application

scenario.title: Designing for Data Consistency in Distributed Systems

milestones.label: M02
milestones.o: You can design and implement infrastructure using Infrastructure as Code (IaC) principles and manage various cloud resources efficiently.
milestones.identity_statement: You are automating infrastructure, transforming manual tasks into scalable, repeatable processes.

modules.title: Infrastructure as Code & Automation
lessons: State Management and Collaboration in Terraform

video.title: Why IaC? Benefits and Best Practices

scenario.title: Choosing the Right IaC Tool

video.title: Deploying a VPC with Terraform

scenario.title: Refactoring a Monolithic Terraform Configuration

video.title: Managing EC2 Auto Scaling Groups and Load Balancers

scenario.title: Automating AMI Updates with Terraform and Lambda

science.desc: A new microservice needs to be deployed with a database, load balancer, and auto-scaling group. Design and implement the infrastructure using Terraform, ensuring modularity and reusability.

video.title: Choosing the Right Database for Your Application

scenario.title: Migrating a Monolithic Database to Microservices

video.title: Deep Dive into AWS RDS and DynamoDB

scenario.title: Optimizing DynamoDB Performance for High Throughput

video.title: S3 Lifecycle Policies and Glacier Archiving

scenario.title: Designing a Cost-Effective Data Lake on S3

milestones.label: M03
milestones.o: You can design and implement highly scalable, fault-tolerant distributed systems capable of handling significant traffic and data volumes.
milestones.identity_statement: You are mastering the art of building resilient systems, ensuring applications perform flawlessly under any load.

video.title: Understanding CAP Theorem and its Implications

scenario.title: Designing a Highly Available Payment Gateway

video.title: Implementing Asynchronous Communication with SQS/SNS

scenario.title: Designing an Event-Driven Data Ingestion Pipeline

video.title: Advanced Load Balancing Techniques and Caching Layers

scenario.title: Optimizing API Performance with Multi-Layer Caching

science.desc: A popular e-commerce website is experiencing performance bottlenecks during peak sales. Design a scalable architecture using distributed systems patterns, including message queues and caching, to handle sudden traffic spikes.

milestones.label: M04
milestones.o: You can design, deploy, and manage containerized applications using Kubernetes, ensuring high availability and efficient resource utilization.
milestones.identity_statement: You are orchestrating the future of applications, mastering Kubernetes to build resilient and efficient deployments.

video.title: Breaking Down Monoliths into Microservices

scenario.title: Designing a Microservice for User Authentication

video.title: Building and Optimizing Docker Images

scenario.title: Containerizing a Multi-Tier Application

video.title: Pods, Deployments, and Services in Kubernetes

scenario.title: Deploying a Stateless Application to Kubernetes

science.desc: A legacy monolithic application needs to be re-architected into microservices and deployed on Kubernetes. Design the microservice boundaries, containerize them, and create Kubernetes deployment manifests.

video.title: Packaging and Deploying Applications with Helm

scenario.title: Creating a Custom Helm Chart for a Complex Application

milestones.label: M05
milestones.o: You can design secure, cost-efficient cloud architectures, implementing best practices for governance, compliance, and operational excellence.
milestones.identity_statement: You are building secure and sustainable cloud environments, optimizing resources for maximum impact and efficiency.

modules.title: Cloud Security & Compliance
lessons: Identity and Access Management (IAM) Best Practices
Data Encryption at Rest and in Transit

scenario.title: Implementing a Multi-Layered Network Security Strategy

science.desc: An internal audit reveals several security vulnerabilities in an existing AWS environment. Develop a remediation plan focusing on IAM, network security, and data encryption to meet compliance standards.

modules.title: Cloud Cost Optimization & Observability
lessons: Cost Optimization Strategies (Rightsizing, Reserved Instances, Spot Instances)
Logging with CloudWatch Logs and ELK Stack
Tracing with AWS X-Ray and OpenTelemetry

milestones.label: M06
milestones.o: You can architect complex, enterprise-grade solutions leveraging advanced AWS services, serverless patterns, and data platforms.
milestones.identity_statement: You are designing the next generation of enterprise cloud solutions, driving innovation and strategic impact.

modules.title: Advanced AWS Architecture Patterns
lessons: Data Lakes and Data Warehousing (S3, Glue, Redshift)

scenario.title: Designing a Secure and Governed Multi-Account AWS Environment

science.desc: A large enterprise needs to migrate its on-premises data warehouse to AWS, integrating with existing applications and ensuring strict security and compliance. Design a comprehensive solution leveraging AWS data services and governance tools.

milestones.label: M07
milestones.o: You can lead complex cloud architecture initiatives, drive technical strategy, and mentor teams, becoming a recognized expert in cloud solutions.
milestones.identity_statement: You are a visionary Cloud Solutions Architect, shaping the future of cloud infrastructure and inspiring technical excellence.

video.title: Designing a Global Multi-Region SaaS Platform

science.desc: Design a highly available, scalable, and cost-optimized cloud architecture for a new global video streaming service, considering various user locations and content delivery requirements.
